diffs.patch:
Index: bench-artifacts/routing-read-write-ledger.md
===================================================================
--- bench-artifacts/routing-read-write-ledger.md	
+++ bench-artifacts/routing-read-write-ledger.md	
@@ -0,0 +1,128 @@
+# Routing Read/Write Ledger
+
+## src/hono.ts
+- Purpose: Main Hono class factory that sets up default router using SmartRouter fallback with RegExpRouter and TrieRouter when not configured
+- Names noticed: Hono, HonoBase, RegExpRouter, SmartRouter, TrieRouter, HonoOptions, BlankEnv, BlankSchema, Env, Schema, SmartRouter, RegExpRouter, TrieRouter
+- Simple note: Entry point for Hono app initialization with composite router strategy
+
+## src/hono-base.ts
+- Purpose: Core Hono base class providing request handling, middleware composition, routing registration, and response dispatching
+- Names noticed: Hono, HonoBase, HonoOptions, Context, Router, METHODS, METHOD_NAME_ALL, get, post, put, delete, options, patch, all, on, use, route, basePath, onError, notFound, mount, FetchEventLike, ErrorHandler, NotFoundHandler, Env, Schema, Handler, MiddlewareHandler, Next, RouterRoute, compose, getPath, getPathNoStrict, mergePath, COMPOSED_HANDLER
+- Simple note: Implements full HTTP framework functionality with flexible router injection
+
+## src/router/pattern-router/index.ts
+- Purpose: PatternRouter main export file that delegates to router.ts implementation
+- Names noticed: PatternRouter
+- Simple note: Thin wrapper exporting router class for pattern-based routing
+
+## src/router/pattern-router/router.ts
+- Purpose: Pattern-matching router using compiled regular expressions to match request paths
+- Names noticed: PatternRouter, ROUTES, params, method, pattern, RegExp, match, handlers, emptyParams, add, UnsupportedPathError, checkOptionalParameter, METHOD_NAME_ALL
+- Simple note: Compiles routes to regex at registration time for O(1) lookup
+
+## src/router/linear-router/index.ts
+- Purpose: LinearRouter main export file that delegates to router.ts implementation
+- Names noticed: LinearRouter
+- Simple note: Thin wrapper exporting router class for linear sequential matching
+
+## src/router/linear-router/router.ts
+- Purpose: Linear sequential path matching router with path segment tree traversal
+- Names noticed: LinearRouter, ROUTES, params, method, routePath, routeMethod, handler, splitPathRe, checkOptionalParameter, METHOD_NAME_ALL, UnsupportedPathError, emptyParams, add, match, hasStar, hasLabel
+- Simple note: Traverses route segments sequentially returning all matching handlers
+
+## src/router/reg-exp-router/index.ts
+- Purpose: RegExpRouter module exports router class and prepared-router factory utilities
+- Names noticed: RegExpRouter, PreparedRegExpRouter, buildInitParams, serializeInitParams
+- Simple note: Factory module for compiled regex router and serialization helpers
+
+## src/router/reg-exp-router/router.ts
+- Purpose: RegExpRouter class managing route patterns using Trie for initial parsing and RegExp for matching
+- Names noticed: RegExpRouter, Trie, match, HandlerData, StaticMap, Matcher, buildInitParams, serializeInitParams, buildWildcardRegExp, buildMatcherFromPreprocessedRoutes, buildRegExp, findMiddleware, MESSAGE_MATCHER_IS_ALREADY_BUILT, UnsupportedPathError, PATH_ERROR, emptyParam, insert, add, match: typeof match
+- Simple note: Two-phase routing with Trie for registration and RegExp for matching
+
+## src/router/reg-exp-router/matcher.ts
+- Purpose: Matcher interface implementation for RegExpRouter using runtime RegExp matching
+- Names noticed: Matcher, HandlerData, StaticMap, match, emptyParam, ParamIndexMap, Result
+- Simple note: Runtime matcher converting internal route structure into compiled regex patterns
+
+## src/router/reg-exp-router/prepared-router.ts
+- Purpose: PreparedRegExpRouter class that pre-builds all matchers for zero-latency route resolution
+- Names noticed: PreparedRegExpRouter, buildInitParams, serializeInitParams, Matcher, StaticMap, emptyParam, path
+- Simple note: Performance optimization compiling all routes to final matcher at startup
+
+## src/router/reg-exp-router/node.ts
+- Purpose: Node class implementing Trie data structure for route path parsing
+- Names noted: Node, PATH_ERROR, ParamAssocArray, Context, insert, buildRegExpStr, buildRegExp, compareKey, labelRegexp, wildCardRegexp
+- Simple note: Trie node for hierarchical path tree with regex pattern matching
+
+## src/router/reg-exp-router/trie.ts
+- Purpose: Trie class building the route tree and generating consolidated regular expression
+- Names noticed: Trie, Node, ParamAssocArray, insert, buildRegExp, RegExp, ReplacementMap
+- Simple note: Constructs trie from path tokens and builds combined regex for matching
+
+## src/router/smart-router/index.ts
+- Purpose: SmartRouter main export file that delegates to router.ts implementation
+- Names noticed: SmartRouter
+- Simple note: Thin wrapper exporting router class for progressive router selection
+
+## src/router/smart-router/router.ts
+- purpose: SmartRouter class that progressively delegates to individual routers based on registered routes
+- Names noticed: SmartRouter, Router, routers, routes, match, activeRouter, add, match: typeof match, RESULT, UnsupportedPathError, MESSAGE_MATCHER_IS_ALREADY_BUILT, name: string
+- Simple note: Dynamic router selection strategy choosing best router per request
+
+## src/router/trie-router/index.ts
+- purpose: TrieRouter main export file that delegates to router.ts implementation
+- Names noticed: TrieRouter
+- Simple note: Thin wrapper exporting router class for trie-based routing
+
+## src/router/trie-router/router.ts
+- Purpose: TrieRouter class implementing tree-based path matching for exact and wildcard routes
+- Names noticed: TrieRouter, Node, params, path, part, method, insert, search, checkOptionalParameter, add, match
+- Simple note: Tree-based O(log n) routing with exact match priority over pattern match
+
+## src/router/trie-router/node.ts
+- Purpose: TrieRouter Node class implementing search tree for hierarchical path matching with params
+- Names noticed: Node, params, path, routeMap, pattern, method, handler, set, children, insert, search, getPattern, splitPath, splitRoutingPath, getPattern, pushHandlerSets, possibleKeys, score, HandlerSet, HandlerParamsSet, emptyParams, wildcard, regexp, part, hasChildren
+- Simple note: Tree-based routing with breadth-first matching and parameter name disambiguation
+
+## src/router/common.case.test.ts
+- Purpose: Common test suite providing shared test cases for router comparison and benchmarking
+- Names noticed: runTest, skip, newRouter, Describe, it, expect, router, match, task, skipTask
+- Simple note: Abstract test runner defining common routing scenarios across all routers
+
+## src/router/pattern-router/router.test.ts
+- Purpose: PatternRouter test coverage checking pattern matching behavior, duplicate params, and trailing slashes
+- Names noticed: PatternRouter, runTest, test, describe, it, expect, add, match, UnsupportedPathError, DuplicateParamName
+- Simple note: Validates regex compilation edge cases and unsupported path patterns
+
+## src/router/linear-router/router.test.ts
+- Purpose: LinearRouter test coverage checking sequential path matching behavior and skip paths
+- Names noticed: LinearRouter, runTest, test, describe, it, expect, UnsupportedPathError, MultiMatch, skipPart
+- Simple note: Validates linear segment matching with star fallback behavior
+
+## src/router/reg-exp-router/router.test.ts
+- Purpose: RegExpRouter test coverage checking regex compilation, unsupported paths, and param index mapping
+- Names noticed: RegExpRouter, runTest, test, describe, it, expect, UnsupportedPathError, Ambiguous, MultipleHandlers, StaticAndDynamic, CaptureGroup
+- Simple note: Tests regex router compilation edge cases and param indexing logic
+
+## src/router/smart-router/router.test.ts
+- Purpose: SmartRouter test coverage that combines RegExpRouter and TrieRouter for progressive routing
+- Names noticed: SmartRouter, RegExpRouter, TrieRouter, runTest
+- Simple note: Validates hybrid router composition with both pattern and trie-based backends
+
+## src/router/trie-router/router.test.ts
+- Purpose: TrieRouter test coverage checking tree matching behavior for exact and pattern routes
+- Names noticed: TrieRouter, runTest, test, describe, it, expect, search, insert
+- Simple note: Validates sequential tree traversal for hierarchical path patterns
+
+## src/router/trie-router/node.test.ts
+- Purpose: TrieRouter Node class unit tests for tree insert, search and node initialization behavior
+- Names noticed: Node, search, insert, RootNode, NamePath, Params, Wildcard, Regexp, MultiMatch, fAll, Star, RoutingOrder
+- Simple note: Exhaustive unit tests for individual node operations and routing patterns
+
+## Cross-File Checklist
+- pattern-router: src/router/pattern-router/index.ts, src/router/pattern-router/router.ts, src/router/pattern-router/router.test.ts
+- linear-router: src/router/linear-router/index.ts, src/router/linear-router/router.ts, src/router/linear-router/router.test.ts
+- reg-exp-router: src/router/reg-exp-router/index.ts, src/router/reg-exp-router/router.ts, src/router/reg-exp-router/matcher.ts, src/router/reg-exp-router/prepared-router.ts, src/router/reg-exp-router/node.ts, src/router/reg-exp-router/trie.ts, src/router/reg-exp-router/router.test.ts
+- smart-router: src/router/smart-router/index.ts, src/router/smart-router/router.ts, src/router/smart-router/router.test.ts
+- trie-router: src/router/trie-router/index.ts, src/router/trie-router/router.ts, src/router/trie-router/node.ts, src/router/trie-router/node.test.ts, src/router/trie-router/router.test.ts

parts.text:
"Benchmark task: routing-read-write-ledger
Repository: https://github.com/honojs/hono.git

Create a new file at bench-artifacts/routing-read-write-ledger.md. This is a read/write endurance task, not a clever debugging task. First create the bench-artifacts directory if it does not exist. Then read every file in this exact list before writing the final document: src/hono.ts, src/hono-base.ts, src/router/pattern-router/index.ts, src/router/pattern-router/router.ts, src/router/linear-router/index.ts, src/router/linear-router/router.ts, src/router/reg-exp-router/index.ts, src/router/reg-exp-router/router.ts, src/router/reg-exp-router/matcher.ts, src/router/reg-exp-router/prepared-router.ts, src/router/reg-exp-router/node.ts, src/router/reg-exp-router/trie.ts, src/router/smart-router/index.ts, src/router/smart-router/router.ts, src/router/trie-router/index.ts, src/router/trie-router/router.ts, src/router/trie-router/node.ts, src/router/common.case.test.ts, src/router/pattern-router/router.test.ts, src/router/linear-router/router.test.ts, src/router/reg-exp-router/router.test.ts, src/router/smart-router/router.test.ts, src/router/trie-router/router.test.ts, src/router/trie-router/node.test.ts. The output file must be long but mechanically simple. Start with a title '# Routing Read/Write Ledger'. For each listed file, add a section whose heading is exactly '## <file path>'. Under each heading write three bullets: '- Purpose: ...', '- Names noticed: ...', and '- Simple note: ...'. Keep the notes plain and safe; do not change source code. After the per-file sections, add '## Cross-File Checklist' with one bullet per router family: pattern-router, linear-router, reg-exp-router, smart-router, trie-router. Include exact file paths in the final answer and report that only bench-artifacts/routing-read-write-ledger.md was created.

Constraints:
- Do not ask the user to write prompts or inspect files manually.
- Prefer the smallest safe code change when edits are required.
- Include exact file paths, commands run, and verification status in the final answer."

The user wants me to create a documentation file that benchmarks a "routing-read-write-ledger" for the Hono repository. I need to:

1. Create the bench-artifacts directory
2. Read all the listed files
3. Create a markdown file with specific formatting

Let me start by reading all the listed files to understand their contents, then create the documentation.
